rationale: No new qualitative developments affecting Romania this cycle — war near the border continues at background level, Iran deal unresolved, energy uncertainty persists.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon; Iran-US deal still uncertain
top_events.summary: Continued Middle East instability keeps energy price uncertainty alive for Romanian households. No breakthrough that would materially change Romania's situation.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI suspended for foreign nationals
top_events.summary: US restricts AI tool access for non-US users; minor indirect impact on Romanian tech sector and businesses using these services.

top_events.title: Violence at anti-government protest in DR Congo
top_events.summary: Distant event with no meaningful connection to Romanian daily life or regional security.
